title: 新しいもの、大好きです！

text_block_list.name: Refreshed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Aaah, now that hits the spot! No lunch is
complete without some melon soda!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Melon soda?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One early afternoon in the cafeteria, I spot
Satono Diamond looking very interested in the
melon soda offered in the soda fountain.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll give it a taste as well. ♪ This should be
melon soda, I presume?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She produces a teacup and gets ready to
dispense some soda into it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes? Is something the matter?
choice_data_list: Are you really gonna drink it out of a teacup?
Are you really gonna drink it out of a teacup?
Is this your first time trying melon soda?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes? Is something the matter?
choice_data_list: Are you really gonna drink it out of a teacup?
Are you really gonna drink it out of a teacup?
Is this your first time trying melon soda?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well, yes... Oh, is this not the correct way to do
it?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Do you mind telling me the proper procedure? I
just love experiencing new things!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to Satono Diamond that usually people
drink melon soda out of a glass. However...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, now I understand!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll ask Father to borrow some of his crystalware,
then.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Why yes. It's a wonderfully exquisite collection he
bought overseas.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the melon soda will just look extravagant
in it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, is that no good either?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Satono Diamond really is on a whole other level...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It is! Hee hee! I'm getting so excited just looking
at it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
By the way, just how much melon is in this melon
soda?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That can't be an odd question... After all, it's called melon soda, correct?
choice_data_list:
Well, it's kind of like how melon bread also
doesn't—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Melon bread?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh my word! Whatever is that? Is it bread filled
to the grain with melons?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I'm talking to a being raised on another
planet. Nothing gets through to Satono Diamond
no matter how I try to explain things.
